categories.name: Manual Washers
categories.shortDescription: Hands-on cleaning stations for shop-floor degreasing
categories.description: Magido manual aqueous parts washers are engineered to handle the most rigorous cleaning challenges found in industrial and automotive maintenance applications. Available in sink-style, vat-style, and high-pressure cabinet configurations, these systems use environmentally safe water-based cleaning solutions to effectively remove oils, greases, dirt, and grime. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, Magido manual washers deliver reliable performance with minimal maintenance — ideal for shop-floor degreasing where hands-on control is essential.

categories.name: Top Load Washers
categories.shortDescription: Versatile spray cabinet washers for small to mid-sized parts
categories.description: Magido top load aqueous parts washers are engineered for automatic spray washing applications using aqueous detergents at temperatures up to 150°F. Each system features a motorized rotating turntable and precision-angled jet nozzles that deliver thorough, consistent cleaning coverage across all part surfaces. Available in compact, standard, and high-performance configurations with turntable sizes ranging from 14" to 55" in diameter, these washers handle everything from small precision components to medium-sized industrial parts. All machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel with options for filtration, rinsing, and drying stages.

categories.name: Front Load Washers
categories.shortDescription: Heavy-duty spray cabinets for large, heavy components
categories.description: Magido front load aqueous parts washers are engineered for automatic spray washing of large, heavy components using aqueous detergents at temperatures up to 160°F. The operation principle uses a fixed platform with a series of angled water jet nozzles configured on a spray ramp to optimally clean all part surfaces. Front load systems feature a removable turntable that transfers easily onto a mobile cart for convenient loading and unloading outside the wash chamber. All machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel with options for filtration, rinsing, and drying stages — built for high-throughput production environments.

categories.name: Immersion Washers
categories.shortDescription: Full-submersion cleaning for complex internal geometries
categories.description: Magido immersion aqueous parts washers are designed for thorough cleaning of parts with complex geometries using a full-submersion agitation process. Parts are lowered into a heated aqueous cleaning solution via a pneumatic platform that oscillates to facilitate the cleaning process, reaching internal passages and intricate features that spray washing alone cannot. Operating at temperatures up to 167°F, these systems are ideal for precision components, machined parts, and assemblies requiring complete surface contact. All machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel and are characterized by their cleaning platform size and load capacity.

categories.name: In-Line Belt Conveyor Washers
categories.shortDescription: Continuous high-volume cleaning integrated into production lines
categories.description: Magido in-line belt conveyor aqueous parts washers are designed for continuous, high-volume cleaning integrated directly into your production line. Parts are loaded onto a stainless steel mesh belt that carries them through single-stage or dual-stage wash and rinse zones at controlled speeds, delivering consistent results without manual handling. Available in compact Silver series and high-capacity Gold series configurations, these systems use environmentally safe aqueous cleaning solutions and are built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. Ideal for manufacturing operations that demand automated throughput with repeatable cleaning quality.

categories.name: Rotary Drum Washers
categories.shortDescription: Helical drum systems for bulk cleaning of small, loose parts
categories.description: Magido rotary drum aqueous parts washers use a helical auger drum system for continuous bulk cleaning of small, loose parts such as fasteners, stampings, and machined components. Parts are loaded into one end of the rotating drum and are carried through the wash zone by the internal helix, emerging clean at the other end — enabling non-stop processing without batching. Available in single-stage and dual-stage configurations with wash and rinse capabilities, all machines are constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel. These systems are the right choice for high-volume operations requiring consistent, automated cleaning.

categories.name: Rotary Immersion Washers
categories.shortDescription: Advanced multi-action cleaning for the most demanding applications
categories.description: Magido rotary immersion aqueous parts washers combine turbulent immersion washing with spray cleaning to deliver superior results on parts with complex geometries. During the cleaning cycle, parts in baskets or fixtures are rotated through an immersion bath while simultaneously receiving spray cleaning, followed by spray and immersion rinsing with an available drying stage. Each system is customizable to your exact specifications and built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. These multi-action washers are ideal for critical components in aerospace, automotive, and precision manufacturing where thorough, repeatable cleaning is essential.

series.name: X51 Series

V-Jet Spray Nozzle System (up to 58 nozzles)
Adjustable Solution Heater & Wash Cycle Timer
availableOptions: Stainless steel lid lifter (pneumatic or electric)

NEMA 4 Electrical Panel With Disconnect Switch
Low Water Shut-Off & Automatic Water Fill Combination
Stainless Steel Wash Nozzles & Custom Header Manifold
Emergency Stop Button At Load & Unload Zones

products.name: L101 Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L101 is an automatic spray jet wash system from the X51 Series, constructed entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. Equipped with a rotating turntable and spray bar that uses water pressure to clean medium and large-sized parts, the L101 operates with aqueous detergents at temperatures up to 150°F. Adjustable temperature and wash cycle time are standard features, with additional options available for filtration and drying stages. The X51 Series is ergonomically designed to reduce shop labor costs without sacrificing wash performance — simply load the parts on the turntable, start the automatic cycle, and return to other tasks.

products.name: G200 In-Line Belt Conveyor Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido G200 is a single-stage in-line belt conveyor aqueous parts washer from the Gold 1b Series, engineered for high-volume continuous cleaning in production environments. Parts ride a stainless steel mesh belt through precision spray zones using heated aqueous detergent for thorough removal of oils, greases, and machining residues. Constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel, the G200 features adjustable belt speed, temperature control, and programmable wash cycles. The Gold 1b Series uses environmentally safe water-based cleaning solutions, making it ideal for manufacturing operations requiring automated inline cleaning with repeatable quality.

The Silver Series is ideal for operations needing automated throughput in a compact footprint.

products.name: DG-8 Manual Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido DG-8 is a sink-style manual aqueous parts washer engineered for industrial and automotive maintenance cleaning applications. This stainless steel cleaning station uses environmentally safe water-based detergents to effectively remove oils, greases, dirt, and grime from small to medium-sized components. Standard features include an external magnetic drive pump, flow-through brush, thermostat-controlled electric heater, and liquid level shut-off. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, the DG-8 delivers reliable hands-on cleaning performance with minimal maintenance. Optional cartridge filter and casters are available.

products.name: DG-9 Manual Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido DG-9 is a sink-style manual aqueous parts washer engineered for industrial and automotive maintenance cleaning applications. This stainless steel cleaning station uses environmentally safe water-based detergents to effectively remove oils, greases, dirt, and grime from small to medium-sized components. Standard features include an external magnetic drive pump, flow-through brush, thermostat-controlled electric heater, and liquid level shut-off. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, the DG-9 delivers reliable hands-on cleaning performance with minimal maintenance. Optional cartridge filter and casters are available.

products.name: L-7 Manual Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L-7 is a vat-style manual aqueous parts washer designed for industrial maintenance and shop-floor cleaning applications. This open-top design allows operators to soak and manually clean larger parts using heated water-based detergent solutions. Constructed entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, the L-7 features a thermostat-controlled heater, external magnetic drive pump, flow-through brush, and liquid level shut-off. Its robust vat design is ideal for degreasing bulky components, engine blocks, and transmission parts where full submersion is beneficial. Optional accessories include a cartridge filter and casters for mobility.

products.name: L-10 Manual Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L-10 is a vat-style manual aqueous parts washer designed for industrial maintenance and shop-floor cleaning applications. This open-top design allows operators to soak and manually clean larger parts using heated water-based detergent solutions. Constructed entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, the L-10 features a thermostat-controlled heater, external magnetic drive pump, flow-through brush, and liquid level shut-off. Its robust vat design is ideal for degreasing bulky components, engine blocks, and transmission parts where full submersion is beneficial. Optional accessories include a cartridge filter and casters for mobility.

products.name: HP-25 Manual Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido HP-25 is a high-pressure manual cabinet parts washer built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. Designed for technicians who need to reduce cleaning time, the HP-25 uses a powerful 870 PSI piston-drive pump to blast parts clean with a heated aqueous solution. Standard features include an LED-illuminated cabinet, ergonomic spray wand, window-clearing blower, thermostat-controlled heater, liquid level sensor, low water shut-off, removable work tray, and screened filter basket. Ideal for cleaning parts with hard-to-reach areas such as wheel bearings, valve bodies, small dies, and cylinder heads.

products.name: HP-30 Manual Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido HP-30 is a high-pressure manual cabinet parts washer built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. Designed for technicians who need to reduce cleaning time, the HP-30 uses a powerful 870 PSI piston-drive pump to blast parts clean with a heated aqueous solution. Standard features include an LED-illuminated cabinet, ergonomic spray wand, window-clearing blower, thermostat-controlled heater, liquid level sensor, low water shut-off, removable work tray, and screened filter basket. products.name: L-35 Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L-35 is a compact top load spray cabinet parts washer from the X81 Series, featuring an automatic rotary turntable and calibrated jet-spray manifold for thorough aqueous cleaning. Designed for work-cell and small-workspace applications, the L-35 uses heated water-based detergent at temperatures up to 150°F to remove oils, greases, and contaminants from small to medium-sized industrial parts. Standard features include a solution heater, complete AISI 304 stainless steel construction, fluid level control, tank drain, and removable filter basket. Its top-loading design makes it the ideal parts washer for space-constrained environments.

products.name: L800FP Top Load Spray Cabinet Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido L800FP is a compact top load aqueous parts washer from the Eco Series, designed with a small footprint that makes it the ideal cleaning solution for limited workspaces. Featuring an automatic sprocket turntable drive, calibrated jet-spray nozzles, and a liquid level sensor, the L800FP delivers efficient spray cleaning using heated aqueous detergent. Built entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel, this washer provides professional-grade cleaning performance in a space-efficient package. The Eco Series is perfect for shops and facilities that need reliable automated parts cleaning without dedicating large floor space.

products.name: A600 Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido A600 is a top load immersion parts washer from the Agita Series, designed for thorough cleaning of parts with complex geometries using the immersion and agitation method. Parts are lowered into heated aqueous cleaning solution via a pneumatic platform that oscillates to facilitate the cleaning process, reaching internal passages and intricate features that spray washing alone cannot. Operating at temperatures up to 167°F, the A600 is constructed entirely from AISI 304 stainless steel. The Agita Series is ideal for precision components, machined parts, and assemblies requiring complete surface contact with the cleaning solution.

products.name: J210 Rotary Drum Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido J210 is a rotary drum aqueous parts washer from the Jolly Series, using a helical auger drum system for continuous bulk cleaning of small, loose parts such as fasteners, stampings, and machined components. Parts are loaded into one end of the rotating drum and carried through the wash zone by the internal helix, emerging clean at the other end for non-stop processing without batching. Constructed from AISI 304 stainless steel, the J210 uses heated aqueous detergent for effective removal of oils, chips, and contaminants. The Jolly Series is ideal for high-volume operations requiring consistent, automated cleaning of small parts.

products.name: PM400 Rotary Immersion Parts Washer
products.description: The Magido PM400 is a 2-stage rotary immersion parts washer from the Platinum Series, using a containment basket to submerge parts in a heated aqueous cleaning solution. The Platinum Series provides an effective method for cleaning critical components with complex geometries, particularly those with internal bores and channels where debris and oils can become lodged. The PM400 incorporates distinct wash and rinse phases using direct spray impingement, hydraulic purging via immersion, and rotational agitation. Built from AISI 304 stainless steel, this system is ideal for precision parts requiring thorough, repeatable cleaning results.
